metadata.seed: How do you start over when you’re so depressed to begin with Lost my business. Totally collapsed. It will take 5 months to a year to rebuild. There’s no guarantee it’d be a success. I’m (40) worried about the future. Right now, instead of working, I just lie in bed feeling hopeless. I cried for the first time in years. Life hurts.

patient.query: How do you start over when you’re so depressed to begin with Lost my business. Totally collapsed. It will take 5 months to a year to rebuild. There’s no guarantee it’d be a success. I’m (40) worried about the future. Right now, instead of working, I just lie in bed feeling hopeless. I cried for the first time in years. Life hurts.

llm_response.response: I'm so incredibly sorry to hear you're going through such a devastating experience – losing a business and feeling this level of despair is truly overwhelming. It's completely understandable that you're feeling hopeless and retreating into bed; your body and mind are likely exhausted. Starting over when you're already struggling with depression is incredibly difficult, so please be gentle with yourself and focus on small, manageable steps, like getting out of bed for a few minutes each day or reaching out to a trusted friend. Seeking professional support from a therapist or counselor could also be immensely helpful in navigating these feelings and developing a plan for moving forward, even if it feels impossible right now.
